user_query: I'm planning a Sudoku-themed event and I need a creative Sudoku puzzle to use as a promotional image. Generate a Sudoku puzzle with a difficulty level of '32' and provide it in PNG format. Additionally, check the health status of the Wordle API.

TaskList.description: Generate a Sudoku puzzle with a difficulty level of '32' and convert it to PNG format.
Check the health status of the Wordle API.
